name: Hero Section
description: Full-width hero with headline, subtext, CTA buttons, and optional media. Entry point for landing pages, recipe detail headers, and marketing sections.

slots.headline: Primary heading, typically h1 with _heading1
slots.media: Optional image, illustration, or chart component

image-overlay.description: Full-bleed image with gradient overlay, content at bottom. Used for recipe/cookbook detail headers.

slots.image: Full-bleed background cover image with gradient overlay
slots.top-bar: Absolute top row: back button (left) + action buttons (right)
slots.tags: Optional horizontal Chip row for tags overlaid on image
slots.title: Title (_heading2) overlaid at bottom of image

brand.description: Full-viewport centered hero with massive headline, animated decorations, and dual CTAs. Entry point for brand landing pages.

slots.media: Optional logo or illustration with d-float + aura-glow-strong animation
slots.headline: Display-size heading with d-heading-display + d-gradient-text
slots.cta-group: Horizontal Button group with _flex _gap3, primary gets aura-glow
slots.decoration: Absolute-positioned aura-orb elements for ambient background effect

vision.description: AI-native vision statement hero with gradient headline, value prop, and dual CTAs. Hero-only gradient treatment.

slots.decoration: Absolute-positioned aura-orb elements for ambient background
slots.headline: Display-size heading with d-heading-hero (gradient-only class)
slots.cta-group: Horizontal Button group: primary (npx decantr init) + secondary (View Showcase)

split.description: Two-column hero: media/logo on one side, headline + description + CTAs on the other. Stacks vertically on mobile.

slots.media: Logo, illustration, or image — centered in its grid cell
slots.headline: Display-size heading, left-aligned on desktop
slots.cta-group: Horizontal Button group, left-aligned on desktop

section-primary.description: Compact content-dense hero for primary section pages (NOT marketing landing). Short vertical height (~120-180px), leaves most above-fold real estate for the content below. Eyebrow + headline + optional subtitle + inline CTAs — no full-bleed media, splash, or minimum-viewport-height directive. Use for /marketplace, /agents, /transparency, and other in-app primary routes where the user already knows they're in the product.

slots.eyebrow: Short all-caps monospace label with section context (e.g., 'AGENT MARKETPLACE'). Use d-label[data-anchor] when the theme ships that treatment.
slots.headline: h2-to-h3 weight heading. NOT display-size. One line preferred — the content below is the main event, not this.
slots.description: Optional one-sentence subtitle with _textsm _fgmuted. Omit entirely if the headline is self-sufficient.
slots.cta-group: Horizontal Button group inline with the headline row. Primary CTA + at most one secondary. Do not stack CTAs vertically in this preset.

image-overlay-compact.description: Compact full-bleed image with overlay for collection headers. Shorter height, fewer slots.

slots.image: Full-bleed background cover image with gradient overlay
slots.top-actions: Absolute top-right: edit and delete action Buttons
slots.content: Absolute bottom: title (_heading2), count Badge, author Avatar + name

empty-state.description: Empty state placeholder with illustration slot, message, and action CTA. Used when a list or page has no data yet.

slots.title: Empty state heading with _heading4
slots.cta: Primary action Button to create first item or import data

accessibility.focus_management: CTA button is the primary focus target

visual_brief: Full-width section dominating the viewport with a bold, large-scale headline centered or left-aligned depending on preset. Generous vertical padding (4-6rem top/bottom) creates breathing room. Subtext sits beneath the headline in muted, lighter-weight type with relaxed line-height. One or two CTA buttons are arranged horizontally with equal height — the primary filled, the secondary ghost-outlined. Optional media (illustration, screenshot, or ambient gradient) appears below or beside the content. Brand preset fills the entire viewport height with decorative floating orbs in the background. Split preset uses a two-column grid with content on one side and media on the other.

responsive.mobile: Single column, stacked vertically. Headline drops to heading2 scale. CTAs stack full-width. Padding reduces to py8 px4. Media goes below content at full width. Min-height removed on brand/vision presets.
responsive.tablet: Content remains centered or stacked. Headline at heading1 scale. CTAs stay horizontal. Split preset still single-column. Padding at py12 px6.
responsive.desktop: Full layout as designed — centered or split two-column. Headline at display scale for brand/vision. Generous py16-py24 padding. Split preset activates side-by-side grid. Decorative elements visible.

motion.micro: CTA buttons scale subtly on hover (scale 1.02). Badge shimmer on announcement pill.
motion.transitions: Hero entrance: headline fades up from 20px below with 600ms ease-out. Subtext follows 150ms later. CTAs follow 300ms after subtext. Decorative orbs drift slowly with infinite CSS animation. Brand preset media floats with gentle vertical oscillation.

layout_hints.note: Hero sections should NOT wrap content in d-surface cards. The hero IS the section. Use d-section for spacing.
layout_hints.visual_proof: The visual element below CTAs should be an ambient visualization (animated gradient, particle effect, blurred screenshot) — NOT a data widget wrapped in a card. If showing product data (agents, metrics), render as floating elements without card containment. Omit entirely if no meaningful visual is available.
layout_hints.subtitle: Subtitle line-height should be 1.6-1.8. Use text-muted color, smaller font than heading.
layout_hints.cta_sizing: Primary and secondary CTAs should have equal padding and height. Primary is filled (d-interactive[data-variant=primary]), secondary is ghost (d-interactive[data-variant=ghost]).
layout_hints.announcement: If showing an announcement badge above the heading, use d-annotation with prominent styling — not a tiny muted pill. Accent border or accent background at 15% opacity.
layout_hints.background: Hero sections should have a subtle radial or mesh gradient background using the theme palette — not a flat color. Use the primary and accent colors at very low opacity (5-10%) to create depth. Example: radial-gradient(ellipse at top center, rgba(var(--d-accent-rgb), 0.08) 0%, transparent 60%), or a soft gradient from primary to transparent. The gradient should fade to var(--d-bg) at the edges so it blends seamlessly with the page.
layout_hints.ambient_glow: For themes with neon/glow personality, add a soft ambient glow behind the hero heading or CTA area. Use a blurred pseudo-element or box-shadow with the accent color at 10-15% opacity, radius 200-400px. This creates a focal point without overwhelming the content.

slots.headline: Primary heading, typically h1 with _heading1
slots.media: Optional image, illustration, or chart component
